httpSample.responseHeader: HTTP/1.1 200 Content-Type: text/plain;charset=UTF-8 Content-Length: 86 Date: Tue, 03 Mar 2026 01:54:41 GMT Keep-Alive: timeout=60 Connection: keep-alive
httpSample.requestHeader: Connection: keep-alive Authorization: bearer ${OPEN_AI_KEY} username: sudh Content-type: json/application Host: localhost:8080 User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/4.5.14 (Java/1.8.0_481)
httpSample.responseData: Current date and time in Germany (Europe/Berlin): 2026-03-03 02:54:40 CET (UTC+01:00).
